---
title: "The Sacrifice Law Workbench"
---

This is the Quarto site for The Sacrifice Law Workbench.

A comparative research workbench for assessing evidentiary support for
Koenigsberg's Law of Sacrifice.

The project assesses the degree to which recurring metaphor systems in
leader-centered political corpora, when compared with historically documented
practices of mobilization, killing, dying, purification, and enemy destruction,
support, complicate, or limit Koenigsberg's Law of Sacrifice, its body-politic
corollary, and the construction of enemies as death.

The workbench is evidence-led. It preserves Koenigsberg's theory as the object
of analysis rather than a conclusion assumed in advance.

## Start here

- [Project Status](project-status.qmd)
- [Current Status](CURRENT_STATUS.md)
- [Primary Research Question](PRIMARY_RESEARCH_QUESTION.md)
- [Methodology](methodology.qmd)
- [Case Selection](case-selection.qmd)
- [Starter Corpus Proposal](starter-corpus-proposal.qmd)
- [Starter Cluster Proposal](starter-cluster-proposal.qmd)
